title: Execution of the 'sw' (Store Word) Instruction
description: A flowchart detailing the step-by-step process and data flow for storing a word from a CPU register into memory, highlighting the roles of the program counter, instruction memory, register file, ALU, and data memory.
relationships: PC fetches address from Instruction Memory
Instruction is decoded to identify 'sw', source register (rt), base address register (rs), and offset
Register File provides the data word from rt and the base address from rs
ALU calculates the effective memory address (base address + sign-extended offset)
Data Memory writes the data word from rt to the calculated effective address
